parameters.name: list_keywords
parameters.description: Lists all keywords within a specific ad group. Returns keyword criterion IDs, text, match type, and bid.

value.adGroupId: ={{ $fromAI('adGroupId', 'The ID of the ad group to list keywords from.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: get_keyword
parameters.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific keyword by its ad group ID and keyword criterion ID.

value.keywordId: ={{ $fromAI('keywordId', 'The ID of the keyword criterion to retrieve.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: add_keyword
parameters.description: Adds a new keyword to an ad group. Requires the adGroupId, keyword text, matchType (EXACT, PHRASE, BROAD), and status (ENABLED, PAUSED). Optional: cpcBidMicros.

value.adGroupId: ={{ $fromAI('adGroupId', 'The ID of the ad group to add the keyword to.', 'string') }}
value.cpcBidMicros: ={{ $fromAI('cpcBidMicros', 'Max CPC bid for this keyword in micros. Optional.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: update_keyword_bid
parameters.description: Updates the CPC bid of an existing keyword. Requires adGroupId, keywordId (criterion ID), and new cpcBidMicros.

value.adGroupId: ={{ $fromAI('adGroupId', 'The ID of the ad group containing the keyword.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: pause_keyword
parameters.description: Sets a keyword's status to PAUSED. Requires adGroupId and keywordId.

value.adGroupId: ={{ $fromAI('adGroupId', 'The ID of the ad group containing the keyword.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: enable_keyword
parameters.description: Sets a keyword's status to ENABLED. Requires adGroupId and keywordId.

value.adGroupId: ={{ $fromAI('adGroupId', 'The ID of the ad group containing the keyword.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: remove_keyword
parameters.description: Sets a keyword's status to REMOVED (deleted). Requires adGroupId and keywordId.

value.adGroupId: ={{ $fromAI('adGroupId', 'The ID of the ad group containing the keyword.', 'string') }}

parameters.jsCode:
if (items.length === 0 || !items[0].json.results) return [];
return items[0].json.results.map(row => ({ json: row.adGroupCriterion || {} }));

if (items.length === 0 || !items[0].json.results) return [];
return items[0].json.results.map(row => ({ json: row }));
